name: MLASTG Coverage Map v0.1
description: MITRE ATLAS technique coverage by the MLSec Application Security Testing Guide (MLASTG). Green = Full coverage (MLASVS controls + MLASTG tests), Yellow = Partial (some controls mapped), Red = No coverage. Import into the MITRE ATLAS Navigator at https://mitre-atlas.github.io/atlas-navigator/

techniques.comment: ML Attack Staging - PIPELINE controls mapped
Search for Tainted ML Data - DATA-001 provenance controls
Obtain ML Model from Public Source - SUPPLY-002 partial
Compromise ML Supply Chain - SUPPLY-001, SUPPLY-002 fully covered
Exploit ML Model for Initial Access - MODEL controls partial
ML Model Inversion Attack - MODEL-003, MODEL-019, MODEL-020 mapped
Craft Adversarial Data - MODEL-001, MODEL-002, MODEL-010, MODEL-016 mapped
Evade ML Model - MODEL-001 through MODEL-003, INFRA-013 mapped
Backdoor ML Model - MODEL-021, MODEL-022, SUPPLY-019 mapped
Model Extraction via Repeated Queries - MODEL-004 through MODEL-006, MODEL-018 mapped
Invert ML Model - MODEL-003, MODEL-019, MODEL-020 mapped
Backdoor ML Model (supply chain variant) - MODEL-021 partial at L2
Poison Training Data - DATA-011, DATA-024, DATA-025 mapped
Label Poisoning (sub-technique) - DATA-011, DATA-013 partial
Publish Poisoned Datasets - DATA-002 integrity controls partial
Exfiltration via ML Inference API - LLM-008, MODEL-009 partial
ML Model Extraction - MODEL-004, MODEL-005, MODEL-006, MODEL-018, MODEL-023 fully covered
Erode ML Model Integrity - MODEL-007, MODEL-008, MODEL-014, MODEL-015 mapped
Model Denial of Service - LLM-011, LLM-012, LLM-013, MODEL-012 mapped
LLM Prompt Injection - LLM-001, LLM-002, LLM-004, LLM-015, LLM-016 mapped
LLM Data Leakage - LLM-003, LLM-008, LLM-009, LLM-014 mapped
LLM Plugin Compromise - LLM-006, LLM-007, LLM-020, LLM-021 partial at L2
LLM Jailbreak - LLM-005, LLM-017, LLM-022 mapped
ML Model Behavioral Manipulation - MODEL-013, INFRA-014, INFRA-018 mapped
ML Model Data Exfiltration - LLM-008, DATA-015 partial
ML Model Inversion Attack - MODEL-003, MODEL-019 mapped
Backdoor ML Model via Poisoning - MODEL-021, MODEL-022, DATA-001 mapped

legendItems.label: Full Coverage (MLASVS controls + MLASTG tests exist)
